1: In the day of his anger!
2: He hath polluted the kingdom and the princes thereof.
4: He poured out his fury like fire.
7: As in the day of a solemn feast.
9: No vision from the LORD LORD .
10: Hang down their heads to the ground.
11: In the streets of the city.
15: The joy of the whole earth?
16: We have found, we have seen it it .
17: He hath set up the horn of thine adversaries.
18: Let not the apple of thine eye cease.
19: In the top of every street.
20: In the sanctuary of the Lord?
